s1.ptxt: When ignition is OFF, connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC.
Drive vehicle so that CVT fluid temperature reaches normal operating temperature (60 to 80 °C (140 to 176 °F)).
Display “Line Pressure” under “Data List” mode on SUZUKI scan tool.
Perform Line Pressure Test , and check that the measured value of the Line Pressure Test and the value of the “Line Pressure” on scan tool are almost the same.
